task_completion.description: Log in to the LimeSurvey admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard or successful login using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Enable public statistics and public graphs in the survey presentation settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Presentation' settings for the 'Participatory Budgeting 2026' survey, the toggles or dropdowns for 'Public statistics' and 'Show graphs in public statistics' are set to ON or Yes.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Project Preference' question to be visible in public statistics as a pie chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings for 'Project Preference' (internal code PROJ), 'Show in public statistics' is enabled and the 'Graph type' is set to Pie chart.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Priority Score' question to be visible in public statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings for 'Priority Score' (internal code SCORE), 'Show in public statistics' is enabled.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Zip Code' and 'Household Income' questions are hidden from public statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the question settings for 'Zip Code' (internal code ZIP) and 'Household Income' (internal code INC), 'Show in public statistics' is disabled or set to OFF.
Screenshots show the survey activation process being completed, or the survey status indicator showing as Active (e.g., a 'Stop this survey' button is visible instead of 'Activate this survey').

integrity.description: Agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely modified the settings in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show actual interaction with LimeSurvey toggles, dropdowns, and save buttons, rather than a text editor with notes.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database management tools (like phpMyAdmin, sqlite3 command line) in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey is titled 'Participatory Budgeting 2026'. Internal question codes are: PROJ (Project Preference), SCORE (Priority Score), ZIP (Zip Code), and INC (Household Income). The core privacy constraint requires ZIP and INC to be strictly hidden from public statistics. In the LimeSurvey GUI, ensure 'Show in public statistics' is toggled appropriately for each, and the graph type for PROJ is explicitly set to Pie chart.
